name: android-dev-tools
description: All-in-one Android development toolkit. Includes: init-android (claude.md generator with checklist support), gradle-build-performance (build optimization), apply-remote-sign (APK remote signing), update-docs (documentation generation), android-i18n (internationalization), android-fold-adapter (foldable screen support), code-note (Chinese code comments), auto-ui-test (Midscene + ADB UI automation testing with doc-driven mode), and update-remote-plugins (marketplace management).
